svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 38px; margin-left: 301px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: tier1 共通データモデル (ER 図 / PostgreSQL 論理スキーマ)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 67px; margin-left: 800px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: tier1 が管理する共通エンティティ。業務固有エンティティは tier2 が所有し、tenant_id で論理分割する

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 117px; margin-left: 70px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tenant
---
PK tenant_id (uuid)
tenant_code (business)
display_name
status (active/suspended/terminated)
tier (free/standard/enterprise)
parent_tenant_id (FK self)
created_at / updated_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 117px; margin-left: 390px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
User (Keycloak 同期)
---
PK user_id (uuid)
FK tenant_id
keycloak_sub (unique)
email
display_name
status
last_login_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 117px; margin-left: 710px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Role
---
PK role_id (uuid)
FK tenant_id (null=global)
role_code
permissions (jsonb)
created_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 117px; margin-left: 1030px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
UserRole
---
PK (user_id, role_id)
granted_by (FK user)
granted_at
expires_at (nullable)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 337px; margin-left: 70px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
AuditLog (WORM / 長期保存)
---
PK audit_id (uuid v7)
FK tenant_id
FK actor_user_id
event_type
resource_type / resource_id
action (create/update/delete/read)
payload (jsonb, PII マスク済)
trace_id / span_id
occurred_at (immutable)
hash_chain (前レコードハッシュ)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 337px; margin-left: 410px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
WorkflowExecution (Temporal 管理)
---
PK workflow_id (uuid)
FK tenant_id
workflow_type
run_id (Temporal)
status (running/completed/failed)
started_at / closed_at
history_location (S3 path)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 337px; margin-left: 750px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
DecisionRule (JDM)
---
PK rule_id (uuid)
FK tenant_id
rule_code
version (semver)
jdm_definition (jsonb)
status (draft/published/deprecated)
published_by / published_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 337px; margin-left: 1090px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
FeatureFlag (flagd 同期)
---
PK flag_id (uuid)
FK tenant_id (null=global)
flag_key
kind (release/experiment/ops/permission)
variants (jsonb)
targeting (jsonb)
updated_by / updated_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 627px; margin-left: 70px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
StateEntry (KV 汎用)
---
PK (tenant_id, store, key)
value (jsonb)
etag (uuid v7 / 楽観排他)
ttl_at (nullable)
updated_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 627px; margin-left: 410px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
OutboxEvent (Transactional Outbox)
---
PK event_id (uuid v7)
FK tenant_id
aggregate_type / aggregate_id
event_type
payload (jsonb)
status (pending/published/failed)
created_at / published_at

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 627px; margin-left: 750px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
PiiCatalog (PII 分類辞書)
---
PK pii_type_id (uuid)
code (個人番号/氏名/メール/電話 等)
sensitivity (low/medium/high/critical)
masking_strategy (hash/partial/redact)
legal_basis (個情法/GDPR)
retention_days

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 627px; margin-left: 1090px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SecretReference (OpenBao メタ)
---
PK secret_id (uuid)
FK tenant_id
secret_path (OpenBao KV パス)
secret_type (api_key/db/cert)
owner_service_id
rotation_interval_days
last_rotated_at

div.div:
運用上の原則
- 全テーブルは tenant_id カラムで論理分割。RLS で強制
- AuditLog は WORM（挿入のみ、更新・削除禁止）を DB 権限で enforce
- OutboxEvent は Debezium CDC で Kafka に送出、二重送信を防止
- StateEntry の etag は UUID v7 (時刻順ソート可) で楽観排他
- PiiCatalog は Audit / Log / Telemetry のマスキング基準を一元化
